pages.title: Suggested Layout
pages.text: $(bold)Atmospheric Condenser$()$(br)Ōåō auto-supplies P downward$(br)$(bold)Bio Incubator$()$(br)Ōåō mature ingredients$(br)$(bold)Serum Bottler$()$(br)Ōåō berry or serum$(br2)Place the condenser directly above the incubator. A belt can supply N/P/D from the player inventory, but does not replace fixed hopper logistics.

pages.title: Hopper Sides
pages.text: $(li)Condenser: bottles enter from top/sides; purified water exits from bottom/sides.$(br)$(li)Incubator: N/P/D enter from sides; mature output exits below; seeds stay manual.$(br)$(li)Splicer: manage inputs and offspring through its GUI or block interaction.$(br)$(li)Bottler: inputs enter from top/sides and products exit below.

pages.title: Blockage Checklist
pages.text: When a line stops, check in order:$(br2)$(li)Are all inputs correct?$(br)$(li)Does the output slot have room?$(br)$(li)Does the incubator have N>10, P>10, and D>0?$(br)$(li)Are hoppers on allowed sides?$(br)$(li)Is the belt equipped, with matching supplies in the player's inventory?
